title: Cornerstone Insurance Shareholders Urge Board to Avoid Regulatory Penalties, Approve 27k Dividend - FinancialEDGE
description: Shareholders of Cornerstone Insurance Plc have advised the board of directors to exercise caution and avoid incidents that may lead to paying penalties to regulators. The advice was given during the company's 33rd Annual General Meeting (AGM), where the shareholders also approved the payment of 27 kobo dividend for the financial year ended December 31,
html: Shareholders of Cornerstone Insurance Plc have advised the board of directors to exercise caution and avoid incidents that may lead to paying penalties to regulators.
